title: More Achievements
description: This mod adds more achievements while still keeping it vanilla.
body:
# More Achievements

This mod adds 7 more achievements to minecraft, while still keeping the vannila style.

![The achievment tree for my mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1822503738ea19ef2fc58c8a99c5298d53bb63c.png)


<details>
<summary>List of all achievements</summary>

- Feed me! (Give a villager some bread.)
- Love in hell (Breed any 2 animals in the nether.)
- Return Trip (Return from the nether to the overworld) Credit @FrostbyteForge
- Thor's Angry (See a lightning strike)
- Time for a snack (Eat a cookie while standing on bedrock)

</details>
